description: UPSC CSE Prelims GS Paper-I objective pattern.
paper_title: UPSC CIVIL SERVICES (PRELIMINARY) — GENERAL STUDIES PAPER I
instructions:
1. There are 100 questions printed both in English and Hindi.
2. Each item carries 2 marks.
3. Penalty for wrong answers: one-third of 2 marks.

marking_scheme.note: One-third of the marks assigned to the question deducted for each wrong answer.

sections.section_instruction: Select the most appropriate answer. Each question: 2 marks.
